name: 07_Image_Super_Resolution_SRCNN_Set5_DL
query: Habari, nahitaji kuunda mradi wa kuongeza azimio la picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRCNN na seti ya data ya Set5 (inapatikana kutoka `https://huggingface.co/datasets/eugenesiow/Set5`). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Wakati wa kupakia data, jumuisha hatua za usindikaji wa awali wa picha kama vile kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfano wa SRCNN unapaswa kupakiwa na kutumika katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi seti 5 za picha za kulinganisha, ukizoom kwenye maelezo, kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`, na matokeo ya kuongeza azimio kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`. Picha zilizozalishwa zinapaswa kuwa za ubora wa juu na kuonyesha wazi maboresho.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.
Matokeo ya kuongeza azimio yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`.

preferences.criteria: Mradi unapaswa kuzalisha picha za kuongeza azimio za ubora wa juu, zilizo wazi na zenye kulinganisha kwa kina.
Picha za matokeo zilizopangwa vizuri, zikionyesha maboresho muhimu, zinapaswa kujumuishwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is only a minimal semantic implementation placeholder. It does not contain any actual code to load the "Set5" dataset from Hugging Face. The function `load_dataset()` returns a hardcoded dictionary and the `requirement_notes()` function only prints the criteria. There is no evidence of using libraries like `datasets` from Hugging Face or any API calls to fetch the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder. The `build_transforms()` function only returns a list of strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` and does not contain any actual implementation for image preprocessing, resizing, or normalization using libraries like torchvision.transforms. The trajectory evidence mentions operations were performed, but the provided source code does not demonstrate the required functionality.

<UNSATISFIED>
The provided evidence shows that `src/model.py` contains only a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging with placeholder code. The file does not contain an actual SRCNN model implementation; it returns a string "model placeholder" and has keywords defined but no real model architecture. The trajectory evidence mentions loading an SRCNN module, but the actual file content does not demonstrate a functional SRCNN model.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is to save five sets of comparison images with enhanced details as `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`. The provided key evidence shows an error when attempting to read this file: "No endpoints found that support image input". While the trajectory evidence indicates a successful save operation occurred earlier, the current state of the file is inaccessible or corrupted for image processing purposes, preventing verification that five sets of comparison images with enhanced details are correctly stored. The existence of a file with that name is not sufficient; the content must be a valid, accessible image file containing the specified comparisons.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the key evidence shows that the file `super_resolution_results.png` could not be read due to an error: "No endpoints found that support image input" (404 error). This indicates the output file either does not exist, is corrupted, or is not a valid image file that can be processed. The trajectory evidence mentions the file was saved successfully, but the direct file content check reveals a failure to access the image, meaning the final required output is not verifiably present and correct.
